stemHtml: You are in receipt of an ATC clearance and flying a procedure designated as RNP 1. Select the true statement from the following options.

options.a: You are allowed to insert latitude and longitude waypoints into the flight plan manually
options.b: You are not allowed to add waypoints defined by bearing, distance, and place unless part of the published procedure
options.c: You may freely modify waypoints as long as RNP criteria are maintained
options.d: You must manually reprogram all RNP waypoints using the current aircraft position references
